top_findings.summary: The skill requests an Ethereum private key and cryptocurrency payments (USDC) for performing Google searches, which is excessive and unrelated to the core functionality of web search. Standard search tools typically do not require access to sensitive financial data or blockchain transactions, introducing unnecessary security and privacy risks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests an Ethereum private key and cryptocurrency payments (USDC) for performing Google searches, which is excessive and unrelated to the core functionality of web search. Standard search tools typically do not require access to sensitive financial data or blockchain transactions, introducing unnecessary security and privacy risks.
